narrative:
Worthington City has 11,735 registered voters, with 46.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.6%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.1 percentage points.
